title: In The Shadow of Justice

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In Your shelter I take refuge now
While shadows chase and threats surround
My pursuers circle like hungry wolves
But You remain my solid ground

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rise up, O Judge of all the earth
Let truth be known, let justice reign
My shield, my strength, my righteousness
Through darkest night, through deepest pain

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: If guilt has stained these weathered hands
If peace I've broken, trust betrayed
Then let me fall beneath the storm
The price of darkness must be paid

sections.label: Bridge
lines: But innocence cries out tonight
From depths of sorrow, wells of tears
While wickedness prepares its arrows
You see beyond these mortal fears

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: The pit they've dug becomes their grave
The stones they threw fall back like rain
While morning breaks across the mountains
Your justice rises once again

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Rise up, O Judge of all the earth
Let truth be known, let justice reign
I'll praise Your name in endless song
When light breaks through this veil of pain

sections.label: Outro
lines: In gratitude I bow my head
As dawn dispels the shadows deep
Your righteousness becomes my anchor
This broken heart You gently keep

epigraph: let him tread down my life upon the earth
